evals.prompt: can you find where MyProcessor is used across our org? I think it's in a few different repos but I'm not sure which ones
evals.expected_output: Agent uses gh search code with --owner flag to find all references to MyProcessor across the organization, presents the repos and file paths where it appears

evals.prompt: who has been contributing to the data-pipeline-config repo recently? I want to see the last few commits by a specific author
evals.expected_output: Agent uses gh search commits with --author and --repo flags to find recent commits by the specified user in the specified repo

evals.prompt: are there any open PRs in my-service that touch the compliance processor? I need to check if someone else is already working on an optimization
evals.expected_output: Agent uses gh search prs with state:open and relevant keywords scoped to the specific repo to find matching PRs
